title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management B2B SaaS company backed by $85M+ and trusted by brands like The New York Times and Wiz, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale its GTM operational backbone. Reporting to the CRO, the role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional match: senior RevOps executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience aligns perfectly with Head of Revenue Operations role requiring 7+ years at scale; Finout's cloud cost management/fintech positioning matches strong fit profile, and Tel Aviv hybrid location is ideal.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations opening and immediately thought of you—the role reads like it was written for your background. Building GTM operational backbone at a $85M+ funded B2B SaaS company scaling past $30M ARR in the fintech/cloud cost space is exactly where your Salesforce admin expertise and cross-functional leadership track record create immediate impact. Given you're based in the Tel Aviv area, the hybrid setup should work seamlessly—I'd love to explore if this is a fit.

title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Render is building a modern cloud platform for developers creating AI-native, full-stack, multi-service applications, offering persistent compute, dynamic autoscaling, built-in orchestration, and observability. The company seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to lead its GTM operations as it scales developer-first SaaS offerings from MVP to millions of users. This is a senior leadership role owning the revenue systems and operational strategy for a fast-growing developer infrastructure company.

Strong GTM infrastructure focus and developer-first motion align with his RevOps/GTM background, though developer infrastructure is slightly less traditional than fintech verticals.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed Render is scaling an AI-native developer platform with a GTM motion that requires sophisticated revenue operations infrastructure—exactly the kind of scaling challenge you've solved repeatedly at high-growth SaaS companies. Your experience building pipeline forecasting and CAC/LTV models in fast-scaling environments would directly accelerate Render's transition from MVP to millions of users. Given your track record operationalizing GTM systems during hypergrowth, this Head of RevOps role seems like a natural fit for what you're looking to build next.

title: RevOps Expert
description: Remote, the global employment platform handling payroll, benefits, taxes, and compliance, seeks a RevOps Expert to optimize sales processes and system architecture. The role drives strategic initiatives aligned with GTM strategy, champions scalable process design, and implements solutions using Six Sigma and Agile methodologies. Requirements include deep Salesforce (SFDC) and enterprise SaaS expertise, experience with tools like LeanData, Zapier, and Camunda, strong process design skills, and a data-driven mindset. SaaS/B2B and remote startup experience preferred. Base salary $51,100–$115,000 USD.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's core RevOps expertise (Salesforce, B2B SaaS, GTM strategy, process optimization). Remote global role matches location flexibility perfectly. Minor gaps: no explicit fintech mention and salary range appears below market for 15+ year senior executive, but role scope and tools (LeanData, Zapier) are ideal fit.

With 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps, deep Salesforce expertise, and a track record implementing scalable GTM systems, I'm interested in exploring how my experience could accelerate your sales infrastructure and GTM alignment.

This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading technical implementation of AI tools across sales. With 15+ years building revenue infrastructure in B2B SaaS, I've architected similar HubSpot data models and led technical implementation of AI across sales teams—the challenge of turning fundraising workflows into predictable pipeline resonates with the GTM problems I've solved before.

title: GTM Engineer

Curious if you'd consider someone who can architect these systems and partner closely with engineers, or if hands-on coding is non-negotiable.
